Autonomous Mode

Additional information attached.
The Mercedes-Benz was leaving the off-ramp of EB Central Expressway and approached the merge at NB San Thomas Expressway. The 
driver yielded to cross traffic at the merge when the Porsche Cayenne vehicle rear-ended the Mercedes-Benz.
